Test Case Description: Verify valid email and password login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to app.vwo.com
2. Enter valid email
3. Enter valid password
4. Click Login
Expected Result: User successfully logs in and is redirected to dashboard

Test Case Description: Verify invalid email and valid password login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to app.vwo.com
2. Enter invalid email
3. Enter valid password
4. Click Login
Expected Result: Error message 'Invalid credentials' is displayed

Test Case Description: Verify session timeout after inactivity
Test Steps:
1. Login successfully
2. Remain inactive for timeout period
3. Attempt to navigate
Expected Result: User is logged out and redirected to login page

Test Case Description: Verify login via SSO
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to login
2. Click 'Login with SSO'
3. Complete SSO flow
Expected Result: User successfully logs in via SSO

Test Case Description: Verify MFA prompt after password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to login
2. Enter valid credentials
3. Click Login
Expected Result: MFA verification screen is displayed if enabled

1. Enter email without @ symbol

Expected Result: Validation error 'Invalid email format' is shown immediately

Expected Result: Strength indicator shows 'Weak'
